reason: Verify implementation and evidence against current acceptance criteria and non-goals.
Check no stack, old-authority, descriptor, source-front-door, or mirror-authority drift was introduced.
Check RVV plugin locality, segment2 owner, statement-plan, target export, and ssh evidence contracts.
Check provider-built route facts, common EmitC neutrality, computed-mask segment2 fact surface, and ABI/header validation.
Check generated-bundle harness, inactive-lane, source/tail preservation, and ssh rvv evidence quality.
Check runtime-scalar segment2 store remains classified as computed-mask segment2, not generic computed-mask memory.
Check runtime-scalar segment2 store provider plan and ABI binding facts.
Check runtime-scalar segment2 store statement-plan step ownership.
Check focused plugin coverage and fail-closed assertions.
Check explicit target artifact ABI and fail-closed coverage.
Check pre-realized materialization, target artifact ABI, and fail-closed coverage.
